'''lakogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidopod|cnidopod]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidopod|cnidopod]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lakogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lækegeth|lækegeth]] || [[word:lækegej|lækegej]] || [[word:lækegesh|lækegesh]] || [[word:lækege|lækege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lakokogoth|lakokogoth]] || [[word:lakokogoj|lakokogoj]] || [[word:lakokogosh|lakokogosh]] || [[word:lakokogo|lakokogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lakogoth|lakogoth]] || [[word:lakogoj|lakogoj]] || [[word:lakogosh|lakogosh]] || [[word:lakogo|lakogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lakofgoth|lakofgoth]] || [[word:lakofgoj|lakofgoj]] || [[word:lakofgosh|lakofgosh]] || [[word:lakofgof|lakofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lakogotho|lakogotho]] || [[word:lakogojo|lakogojo]] || [[word:lakogosho|lakogosho]] || [[word:lakogoko|lakogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lakogoth|lakogoth]] || [[word:lakogoj|lakogoj]] || [[word:lakogosh|lakogosh]] || [[word:lakogo|lakogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lakogothol|lakogothol]] || [[word:lakogojol|lakogojol]] || [[word:lakogoshol|lakogoshol]] || [[word:lakogokol|lakogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lakogothotho|lakogothotho]] || [[word:lakogojojo|lakogojojo]] || [[word:lakogoshosho|lakogoshosho]] || [[word:lakogoko|lakogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lakogothon|lakogothon]] || [[word:lakogojon|lakogojon]] || [[word:lakogoshon|lakogoshon]] || [[word:lakogokon|lakogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lakogothoro|lakogothoro]] || [[word:lakogojoro|lakogojoro]] || [[word:lakogoshoro|lakogoshoro]] || [[word:lakogokoro|lakogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
